name: Adventurers prize
description:
The Dawn Scouts were formed in response to the growing demand for adventurers capable of exploring the abandoned ruins and dungeons that dot the Kingdom of Alveris. Eryndor, Lyra, and Arin met at the tavern The Sleeping Dragon in the town of Willowdale, sharing stories and ambitions.

Their first success came when they discovered the lost city of Eldarath, hidden in the forests of Silverleaf. The fame and fortune they gained allowed them to establish their guild in an ancient mansion in the heart of Willowdale.

Over the years, the Dawn Scouts have participated in numerous quests, rescuing treasures, defeating monsters, and unraveling ancient mysteries. Their reputation as one of the most respected and feared guilds in the kingdom is well deserved.
creator: DanakaX
